text:
Effective: 03-01-20, Implementation: 01- 11-21) 

In enacting the Medicare program, Congress recognized that the physician or allowed 
practitioner would play an important role in determining utilization of services. The law 
requires that payment can be made only if a physician or allowed practitioner certifies the 
need for services and establishes a plan of care. The Secretary is responsible for ensuring 
that Medicare covers the claimed services, including determining whether they are
